creator: yuri@tsoft.com
text:
Compilation failure occurred on upgraded to 7.0-BETA2 machine during make buildworld.

ataset.c: In function 'zvol_create_link_common':
/usr/src/cddl/lib/libzfs/../../../contrib/opensolaris/lib/libzfs/common/libzfs_d
ataset.c:3466: error: 'TEXT_DOMAIN' undeclared (first use in this function)
/usr/src/cddl/lib/libzfs/../../../contrib/opensolaris/lib/libzfs/common/libzfs_d
ataset.c: In function 'zvol_remove_link':
/usr/src/cddl/lib/libzfs/../../../contrib/opensolaris/lib/libzfs/common/libzfs_d
ataset.c:3512: error: 'TEXT_DOMAIN' undeclared (first use in this function)
/usr/src/cddl/lib/libzfs/../../../contrib/opensolaris/lib/libzfs/common/libzfs_d
ataset.c: In function 'zfs_get_proplist_common':

ataset.c:3556: error: 'TEXT_DOMAIN' undeclared (first use in this function)

ataset.c: In function 'zfs_jail':

ataset.c:3828: error: 'TEXT_DOMAIN' undeclared (first use in this function)
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src/cddl/lib/libzfs.

Fix: 

WITHOUT_ZFS=TRUE in /usr/src.conf
but compile should succeed w/out such option
